node.statement: The FQHE transport coefficients R_xy(B) and R_xx(B) for a GaAs/AlGaAs 2DEG can be computed from the non-relativistic many-body Hamiltonian through a chain of controlled approximations: effective mass, 2D confinement, Landau quantization, LLL projection, Haldane sphere geometry, pseudopotential decomposition, exact diagonalization, finite-size extrapolation, and semicircle transport law.
